'''鈭歵-j-g-dh''' ('''katajgedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeet|yeet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeet|yeet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-j-g-dh
|-
! Lemma
| katajgedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitajgedhoko|thitajgedhoko]] || [[word:jitajgedhoko|jitajgedhoko]] || [[word:shitajgedhoko|shitajgedhoko]] || [[word:kitajgedhoko|kitajgedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotajgedhoko|thotajgedhoko]] || [[word:jotajgedhoko|jotajgedhoko]] || [[word:shotajgedhoko|shotajgedhoko]] || [[word:kotajgedhoko|kotajgedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tajgedhoko|th忙tajgedhoko]] || [[word:j忙tajgedhoko|j忙tajgedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙tajgedhoko|sh忙tajgedhoko]] || [[word:k忙tajgedhoko|k忙tajgedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
